emission.notes: Market-driven emission: BlockReward = k * log2(Difficulty), k previously documented as 221,077,819,000,000,000 (attowei units). No fixed halving schedule. Reward sampled at 2026-05-30 at difficulty 1.5023T per minerstat (~9.0726 QUAI per zone). Quai is hierarchical (Prime/Region/Zone): per-zone target block time is 10s; 9 parallel zones give a network-aggregate effective block time of ~1.111s, which is the figure used for daily_emission math. SOAP buyback-and-burn (launched Dec 2025) offsets emissions toward a target of ~180M QUAI/yr burned. Singularity Fork (Dec 2025) skipped ~1.67B of future genesis unlocks via multilateral agreement; protocol hard cap remains 3B but effective soft cap is ~1.4B.

premine.details: 3 billion QUAI allocated at genesis across 7 categories with time-locked vesting. Remaining supply issued through PoW mining with market-driven difficulty-based rewards. ~70M QUAI from the Testnet & Earn bucket designated for burn.

red_flags: 100% premine - zero supply available for permissionless mining at TGE; only paths in were claims, exchange, or vesting unlock
~69% of supply sits with insider/entity-controlled tiers (Foundation 33% + Team 16% + DevCo 6% + investors 14%); Community Incentives (23%) is also foundation-controlled
Claims excluded US persons and OFAC-sanctioned jurisdictions, materially limiting eligibility for early contributors
Non-refundable $5 ETH KYC fee via Fractal.id required even for claimants ultimately deemed ineligible
Fractal.id (Quai's KYC vendor) suffered a confirmed 2024-07 data breach exposing ~50K users' PII; Quai still used the vendor for 2025 claims
Adaptive market-driven emission with no fixed cap on issuance rate; 1.33B 'illustrative' baseline depends on SOAP buybacks, not a hardcoded limit
Dual-token QUAI/QI design (EVM utility token + UTXO energy-backed stablecoin) introduces integration and regulatory complexity
Asymmetric cost basis: seed investors at <$0.09/token, ATH $0.36 (2025-02-24), price now ~$0.021 (-94% drawdown); seed allocations stay in-the-money down to <$0.001
Concentrated 12-month cliff overhang on 2026-02-05: Seed 1 (10%) + Strategic (2%) + Team (16%) cliffs end + Seed 2 (2%) first 25% lands — ~30% of supply at the same date
Foundation Reserve (33% of supply) controlled by Quai Foundation multisig with signers/threshold not publicly disclosed
Development Company allocation (6%) sits with a single private entity (Dominant Strategies Inc.) with 25% liquid at TGE

Singularity Fork (Dec 2025) modified genesis economics retroactively, removing ~1.67B QUAI of future unlocks via off-chain multilateral agreement — demonstrates that genesis terms are mutable via insider coordination
Tight claim deadlines (Jan 27 / Feb 3 / Feb 21 2025) with KYC + Pelagus Wallet friction; unclaimed allocations retained by the project, not redistributed pro-rata
Documented genesis buckets at docs.qu.ai sum to 99% — a 1% gap with no named bucket (modeled here as Undisclosed/Unaccounted under entity-controlled tier)
transparency_notes: Tokenomics documentation at docs.qu.ai is reasonably structured: tier %, cliff/vesting durations, and emission philosophy are all publicly stated
Total funding well-documented across three rounds: Seed 1 $8M (Polychain-led, Mar 2022), Seed 2 $2M (Alumni Ventures, May 2022), Strategic $5M (Cogitent-led, Aug 2024) — total $15M
Individual investor and team-member allocations within each round are NOT disclosed — only round-level totals and lead names
~70M QUAI testnet burn acknowledged in docs; 64.9M already burned per Coingabbar reporting, though no specific tx hash surfaced
KYC ($5 ETH via Fractal.id) and OFAC/US-jurisdiction exclusions for claims were disclosed in advance via the claims announcement
Claims Terms & Conditions page (qu.ai/quai-claims-terms-and-conditions) returns 404 as of 2026-05-30 — legal terms users agreed to no longer publicly available (transparency regression)
Listed on CertiK Skynet but no full third-party audit report (Trail of Bits / OpenZeppelin / Quantstamp) surfaces in public search
Per-bucket vesting schedules (TGE %, cliff months, linear vesting months) are documented in enough detail to compute a vesting waterfall
Singularity Fork (Dec 2025) was publicly announced with rationale; multi-party (investors + Dominant Strategies + Foundation) signatories not itemized
SOAP buyback-and-burn (launched Dec 2025) documented with mechanics; cited chain-revenue ($3.1M cumulative, 64M burned) lacks itemized on-chain audit trail
Foundation Reserve multisig signers and threshold NOT publicly disclosed — gap relative to mature premine projects
notes: 100% premine at genesis (3B QUAI), all with time-locked vesting schedules; 0% available for mining at TGE
Hierarchical multi-chain architecture (Prime/Region/Zone) — 9 parallel zones at ~10s each give ~1.111s network-aggregate block time
Dual-token system: QUAI (EVM utility/smart contracts) and QI (UTXO energy-backed stablecoin)
Market-driven adaptive emission via BlockReward = k * log2(Difficulty); no fixed halving schedule
Singularity Fork (Dec 2025) skipped ~1.67B QUAI of future genesis unlocks via multilateral agreement, lowering effective soft cap to ~1.4B (protocol hard cap remains 3B)
SOAP buyback-and-burn protocol launched Dec 2025 — targets ~180M QUAI/yr burned to offset mining emissions
~70M QUAI (2.3% of supply) from unallocated Testnet & Earn slated for burn; 64.9M already burned per Coingabbar
Total funding $15M across 3 rounds: Seed 1 $8M Polychain (Mar 2022), Seed 2 $2M Alumni Ventures (May 2022), Strategic $5M Cogitent + MH/TPC/Giga Chad/DexCheck Ventures (Aug 2024)
Per-zone block reward 9.0726 QUAI at difficulty 1.5023T (minerstat, 2026-05-30); reward varies block-by-block
24h volume varies dramatically across aggregators ($29.7k CG vs $303.7k CMC) indicating thin liquidity
